common.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

hero.title: Explore the world with confidence.
hero.description: Access exclusive deals, manage your itineraries, and discover hidden gems around the globe.

login.title: Welcome
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your journey

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Join our global travel community and start exploring.
register.termsRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions

verifyOtp.title: Verify Your Identity
verifyOtp.description: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to your email

payments.title: Checkout
payments.subtitle: Secure encryption for your peace of mind

integration.stripeModeDescription: This checkout loads Stripe.js in test mode and sends card data directly to Stripe through Payment Element.
integration.fakeModeDescription: This checkout uses the backend mock provider so you can still validate success, failure, and duplicate scenarios without Stripe configured.
integration.secureFormDescription: The card fields below are hosted by Stripe. TravelHub only receives the confirmation token.
integration.stripeFieldHint: Use Stripe test cards in the embedded form after preparing the secure session.
integration.sessionError: The secure form could not be initialized.
integration.sessionNeedsRefresh: The secure session was reset because the reservation data changed.
integration.securityNoticeStripeHint: The raw card number, expiration date, and CVV are sent directly to Stripe from the browser.
integration.requiresActionDescription: Stripe requested an extra verification step before final confirmation.
integration.confirmationTokenError: Stripe could not create the confirmation token.
integration.duplicateOnlyFake: The duplicate scenario is only simulated in mock mode. In Stripe mode the server-side flow uses a different session lifecycle.

payments.securityNotice: You can edit these mock values for the demo, but the backend receives only the payment token.
payments.tokenHint: Use tokens such as pm_tok_visa_ok, pm_fail_insufficient_funds, or pm_fail_card_declined to reproduce the MVP scenarios.

feedback.readyDescription: Choose a payment scenario to validate the minimum viable behavior of the story.
feedback.successDescription: Receipt {receipt} was generated and the backend requested reservation confirmation.
feedback.failureInsufficient: The card was rejected due to insufficient funds. The traveler can retry with another card.
feedback.failureDeclined: The card was declined. The traveler can retry with another card.
feedback.duplicateDescription: The backend rejected a second immediate attempt for the same operation, preventing an accidental double charge.
feedback.duplicateUnexpectedDescription: The second attempt was not blocked as expected. Review the backend or change the data and retry the test.
feedback.requestErrorDescription: The backend could not complete the payment request.
feedback.timeoutDescription: The request took too long. Verify that the payments backend is running and try again.
feedback.backendUnavailableDescription: The frontend could not reach the payments backend. Verify that it is running and that the configured URL is correct.
feedback.invalidResponseDescription: The frontend received an invalid response from the payments backend.
feedback.eventsUnavailable: The payment was processed, but the frontend could not load the event trail from the backend.
feedback.stripeReadyDescription: Prepare the secure Stripe form and use a Stripe test card to validate the token-only flow.
feedback.pendingVerificationDescription: The payment is being verified. Check the latest payment status again in a few seconds.

errors.invalidConfirmationResponse: The payment confirmation response was invalid.
errors.invalidCheckoutStatusResponse: The checkout status response was invalid.

events.title: Payment events
events.caption: This section shows the real event trail returned by the backend for the latest processed payment.
events.empty: There are no events yet. Process a payment or test a duplicate to see them here.

summary.footer: No hidden fees. Free cancellation until Oct 5.

compliance.bannerDescription: This checkout uses Stripe-hosted payment fields only. TravelHub never receives raw card numbers, CVV, or expiration dates in compliance mode.
compliance.strictModeDescription: Compliance mode is active. Manual card fields are disabled and payment data must flow through Stripe Payment Element.
compliance.strictModeHint: Prepare the secure Stripe form to continue with a token-only payment flow.
compliance.misconfiguredTitle: Stripe secure mode is not ready
compliance.misconfiguredDescription: Compliance mode is active, but the payments service is not exposing Stripe test mode. Review the backend configuration before processing payments.

property.exploreOurSelection: Explore our selection of luxury properties and find the perfect place for your next adventure
property.noPropertiesFound: No properties available at the moment
property.travelHubPlusDesc: Verified for quality, comfort, and premium service.
property.travelerProtection: Traveler Protection included. Full refund if canceled within 48 hours of booking.

flexible.label: Flexible
flexible.description: Free cancellation within 48 hours. Afterwards, a 50% charge applies.

moderate.label: Moderate
moderate.description: Free cancellation up to 7 days before check-in. Afterwards, full charge applies.

policies.freeCancellationDesc: You can cancel up to 48 hours before check-in and receive a full refund.
policies.dateChangeDesc: You can change your stay dates at no extra cost, subject to availability.
policies.securityDepositDesc: A security deposit equivalent to one night is required. It will be refunded after check-out.
policies.propertyDamageDesc: The guest is responsible for any damage caused during their stay.

booking.youWontBeCharged: You won't be charged for now
booking.confirmationSent: A confirmation email has been sent to your inbox.
booking.checkInInstructionsDescription: View details on how to access the property upon arrival.
booking.nextStepsDescription: Your reservation is pending payment. Please visit the payment portal to complete the transaction. Once payment is confirmed, you will receive a final confirmation email.

success.title: Booking Confirmed!
success.subtitle: A confirmation email has been sent to your inbox.

receipt.title: Receipt
receipt.label: Receipt
receipt.pdfSubtitle: Your payment was confirmed successfully. Keep this document for your travel records.
receipt.footer: Generated from your TravelHub confirmation page.

verification.title: Your payment is being verified
verification.subtitle: We are reconciling the final payment status with Stripe.
verification.description: This can happen after a timeout right after payment confirmation. TravelHub will keep checking in the background for up to 30 seconds.
verification.expired: We are still waiting for the final confirmation from Stripe. Please check again in a moment or return to checkout.
verification.failed: We could not validate the final payment status.

errors.title: We could not load the confirmation
errors.missingReference: A payment reference is required to display this confirmation.
errors.backendUnavailable: We could not verify the payment right now. Please try again in a moment.
errors.insufficientFunds: The payment could not be confirmed because the card has insufficient funds.
errors.paymentDeclined: The payment could not be confirmed because the card was declined.
errors.invalidConfirmationResponse: The payment confirmation could not be processed.
errors.invalidCheckoutStatusResponse: The latest checkout status could not be processed.

reservationHistory.title: My reservations
reservationHistory.subtitle: Review the latest reservation confirmations generated after your successful payments.
reservationHistory.emptyTitle: You do not have reservations yet
reservationHistory.emptyDescription: Once a payment is confirmed, your reservation summary will appear here.

errors.unavailable: This property is not available for these dates

search.pageDescription: Explore available properties and filter by city, dates, guests, amenities, and price.
search.heading: Properties in {city}
search.summaryReady: Complete the filters and press Search to see available properties.
search.errorTitle: We could not load the search
search.emptyDescription: Try changing the city, dates, or reduce the filters to see more options.
search.amenitiesHint: Select one or more filters to refine the results.

validation.requiredGuests: You must enter at least 1 guest
validation.priceInvalid: Price must be a valid number
validation.priceRange: Max price must be greater than or equal to min price
